chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.475 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.2282/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.2283/2024 21.04.2026 Mr. Pervez Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question framed is evidential in nature and no question of law has been articulated meriting interference in reference jurisdiction. In view hereof, this reference is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Asif
